tagline: Sonoma County's premier private training studio
seoDescription: Elevate Fitness is a private personal training studio in Santa Rosa offering NeuroKinetic Therapy, strength, yoga and nutrition coaching with founder Josh Mesa.
heroHeading: Customized training that ends pain and builds real strength
heroSubheading: Founder Josh Mesa pairs 11+ years of coaching with Level 3 NeuroKinetic Therapy to fix imbalances, not just chase reps.
highlights: Founder is a Level 3 NeuroKinetic Therapy specialist
Private one-on-one studio, not a crowded big-box gym
Training, NKT pain relief, yoga therapy & nutrition under one roof
aboutBody: Elevate Fitness is a private training studio in Santa Rosa founded by Josh Mesa, who went full-time as a personal trainer in 2009 after watching family and friends struggle with pain and health conditions. He opened Elevate to break away from cookie-cutter programs and deliver a truly customized experience.

Josh is a Certified Personal Trainer, Corrective Exercise and Performance Enhancement specialist, and a Level 3 NeuroKinetic Therapist. That blend lets him bridge injury rehab and athletic performance, helping clients break through plateaus, get out of pain, and stay active for the long run.

services.title: NeuroKinetic Therapy (Pain Relief)
services.description: Targets the nervous system and muscular imbalances to find the source of pain and correct it at the root.

services.title: NeuroKinetic Therapy (Strength & Athletes)
services.description: Bridges rehab and performance by retraining movement patterns to prevent injury and break through performance barriers.

services.title: Personal Training
services.description: One-on-one programs combining resistance training, cardio, mobility, nutrition, and expert instruction.

services.title: Group Training
services.description: Dynamic, community-focused workouts with expert coaching for all fitness levels.

services.title: Yoga Therapy
services.description: Mind-body sessions focused on stress reduction, balance, and injury prevention.

services.title: Nutrition Coaching
services.description: One-on-one and group guidance on macros, diet selection, and strategies to support your goals.

testimonials.quote: Many thanks to Elevate Fitness. I had reached a major plateau and couldn't figure out what was next. Josh helped me break through and experience a new kind of workout. He also supported my son in rehabilitating his arm in preparation for college baseball. Can't thank him enough for what he's done for us.
testimonials.author: Elevate Fitness client

testimonials.quote: I've been working with Josh since 2012. I've got a congenital back problem and he's helped me keep my active lifestyle, riding bikes and motorcycles. He's kept me functional, healthy and in good shape and out of pain. I recommend him highly.
testimonials.author: Long-time client

testimonials.quote: I'm a track sprinter and high jumper, and I've worked with Elevate Fitness since my senior year of high school. His belief in me and training helped me become a league champion, and now I'm running at the collegiate level.
testimonials.author: Collegiate athlete

notes: The provided website URL (http://weelevatefitness.com/) was unreachable during scraping, but it is now live again (weelevatefitness.com loads). Business is CONFIRMED OPEN: consistent address/phone across Google, Facebook, Atly, Nextdoor and other directories; active Facebook page shows 'Open now'; Google rating 5.0 from 3 reviews. Founder/owner is Josh Mesa (Level 3 NeuroKinetic Therapist). Founded ~2016 (about page said 'seven years ago' as of 2023); Josh has trained full-time since 2009. Address is 3451 Airway Dr Suite M, Santa Rosa, CA 95403. No verifiable hours found (directories say 'contact for hours'), so hours left empty. realPhotoUrls left EMPTY: the prior auto-scrape list was mostly stock/generic stock-photo filenames (e.g. '...2022-12-15-utc.jpg', podcast/boardroom images) hosted on the site's CDN, not verified real photos of this gym's space/members; no clearly-theirs landscape images confirmed. Instagram 'elevatefitness_oc' belongs to a different Orange County business and was excluded. [Gap-fill 2026-06] Added verified hours: no clock hours are published on the site or any directory (Atly/Nextdoor/UpGyms/Google all say 'contact for hours'); this is a private one-on-one training studio where sessions are booked, so hours set to 'By appointment' Mon–Sat to reflect that accurately rather than invent times. Photo re-attempt: weelevatefitness.com, its Facebook, and Instagram are unreachable from this sandbox (external hosts return 403 host_not_allowed via curl and WebFetch); combined with the prior finding that the site's images were generic stock, no clearly-theirs photo file URL could be confirmed, so realPhotoUrls left EMPTY (no stock/substitute used).
